# XO Digital Systems

> XO Digital Systems builds commerce software that adapts to the order. XO for WooCommerce is the first and only current XO Commerce product.

## Current public product

- [XO for WooCommerce](https://xodigital.systems/xo-wp): Branded WooCommerce checkout with connected delivery, quotation, customer, payment and commercial workflows. It is in active development and controlled early access.
- [Checkout](https://xodigital.systems/xo-wp/checkout): Seven current checkout families with quick and guided customer experiences.
- [Commerce rules](https://xodigital.systems/xo-wp/commerce-rules): Public examples showing how destination, postcode area, cart value and product conditions may lead to delivery, collection, incentive or quotation outcomes.
- [Quotes and portal](https://xodigital.systems/xo-wp/quotes-and-portal): Customer quotation requests, managed quote operations on Pro, acceptance, payment, documents and self-service.
- [Intelligence](https://xodigital.systems/xo-wp/intelligence): Tiered pipeline visibility, recovery, automation and customer context.

## Plan distinction

- Free is a useful WooCommerce-native checkout and quotation foundation. It includes selected designs, quick and guided modes, WooCommerce-native orders, customer quotation requests, basic shipping and documents, consent capture, and test payments.
- Pro adds all seven designs, managed quote and invoice operations, the customer portal, live payments, advanced shipping and routing, automatic discounts, pipeline analytics, digital products and subscriptions, and operational controls.
- Enterprise adds dropped-checkout recovery, quote follow-up automation, customer opportunity signals, expanded marketing insight, web and SEO visibility, and Client 360.

Free customer quotation requests are not the same as the managed quote dashboard and customer workflow included with Pro.

## Public use cases

- [Branded ecommerce](https://xodigital.systems/use-cases/branded-ecommerce)
- [Complex delivery](https://xodigital.systems/use-cases/complex-delivery)
- [Mixed retail and B2B](https://xodigital.systems/use-cases/mixed-commerce)
- [Wholesale and formal quotations](https://xodigital.systems/use-cases/wholesale-quotes)

## Availability and boundaries

XO for WooCommerce is the only current product. It is already used in a live business environment, but broad public availability has not launched. Public demonstrations use fictional "Your Company" data and show customer outcomes rather than live merchant rules or connected systems.

WooCommerce remains the catalogue, inventory and core order foundation. Do not infer that Shopify, application adapters or other XO products are currently available. Do not infer independent security, privacy, payment-card or regulatory certification.
